title: Slash AI Costs: Smart Model Choice for Max ROAI! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof advises matching model complexity to task requirements rather than defaulting to high-capability models. The strategy aims to maximize return on AI investment through cost-effective model selection.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof argues for matching model complexity to task requirements instead of defaulting to high-capability models. The point matters because model selection drives AI spending, and routing simpler tasks to lighter models reduces cost without sacrificing fit. The takeaway: treat model choice as a cost lever to maximize return on AI investment.
